category_note: Twitch is bought through Amazon Ads (ADSP - Amazon DSP). Mix of premium video, vertical video, stream display, mobile feed, and high-impact takeover formats. Map to Programmatic, Direct Digital, or BVOD depending on format and how the buy is executed.
platform_notes: All ads served via Amazon DSP (ADSP) or direct Amazon Ads insertion order
Twitch requires SSL compliance for all creative and tracking (HTTPS)
No DMP or third-party JavaScript tracking — only 1x1 pixel impression/click trackers from approved 3P vendors
VAST 2.0 and 3.0 supported; VAST 4.0 and VPAID NOT supported
Skip function NOT supported on most video formats
AU locale availability varies by format — confirm per format below

formats.placement: Pre-roll and mid-roll across Twitch live broadcasts. Desktop, mobile, tablet, console, streaming TV. 100% above the fold, unskippable.
formats.clickable: Yes (except console and streaming TV inventory)
formats.supply_deadline_rule: Confirm with Amazon Ads account manager — typical SLAs apply
best_practice_notes: 100% above the fold and unskippable — high attention placement
Note SureStream inventory is SSAI pre-fetch; tags must be supplied accordingly
Required alphanumeric 'id' attribute on <Creative> element in VAST XML

formats.placement: Desktop: silent ads adjacent to livestream. Mobile: unmuted, skippable, full-screen within feed.
file_type: MPG, MPEG, M2P, M2T, M2TS, PS, TS (MPEG-2)
formats.supply_deadline_rule: Confirm with Amazon Ads account manager
best_practice_notes: Native 9:16 design — adapts to both desktop and mobile viewing contexts
Mobile is unmuted by default; desktop is silent

formats.placement: Renders alongside Twitch live stream — between stream and chat, or below player. Available via ADSP.

ad_units_desktop.name: Mirror-C
ad_units_desktop.rendered_as: Upscaled to 300x1050 with auto top/bottom bands matched to creative hex colour

ad_units_mobile.name: Mobile lower-third
ad_units_mobile.placement: Below live stream player, portrait mode

ad_units_mobile.name: Mobile left-third
ad_units_mobile.placement: Left of live stream player, landscape mode

formats.tracking: Approved 3P impression and click trackers accepted
creative_guidelines: Claims/disclaimer max 20% of total ad height
Mirror-C: NO borders. Top and bottom ~84px should be consistent colour (left side preferred) for clean band creation
Lowerthird/Skyscraper: borders optional but required if contrast vs white (#FFFFFF) or dark (#0E0E10) below 3:1
formats.supply_deadline_rule: Standard creative: 8 business days build + 3 business days launch. Animated: 15 + 3 business days.

formats.placement: Full-screen ads within Twitch mobile app discovery feed (mobile only)
formats.clickable_area: Auto-generated 'Learn More' CTA button only — not the full ad
formats.cta_note: 'Learn More' button is auto-generated; cannot be customised. Do NOT design additional CTAs into creative.
creative_guidelines: Claims/disclaimer max 20% of total ad height
Ad disclosure + CTA button account for 12% of total ad height — design around this
Reference Twitch PSD template for safe zones
formats.available_locales_note: Currently available: CA, MX, US, DE, ES, FR, IT, UK, JP. AU NOT in current rollout — confirm with Amazon Ads if AU availability has changed.

lead_times.with_design_support: Additional 8 days for design + 1 round client review

formats.placement: Viewer's first watched broadcast of the day. Exclusive: one advertiser per day per geo.
formats.buy_basis: Per day per geo, daily rate
formats.supply_deadline_rule: Confirm with Amazon Ads — high-impact format, allow extra lead time for booking
best_practice_notes: Exclusive ownership of the day — design for impact
Note SureStream inventory is SSAI pre-fetch

formats.placement: Twitch desktop homepage + mobile app default landing page. Clickable, above the fold.

components_desktop.centre_hex_colour: Hex code for central background colour (e.g. #000000)

creative_guidelines: Claims/disclaimer max 20% of total ad height
Desktop safe zone: keep all elements within 150px from edges to avoid UI overlap
Mobile full-screen: 'Learn More' CTA auto-generated (12% of total height) — do not add additional CTAs
PSD template available from Amazon Ads
formats.tracking: Site served. Approved 3P impression and click trackers accepted. NO DMP or 3rd party JavaScript tracking.

additional_formats_not_detailed: Super Leaderboard (IAB standard) — confirm dimensions with Amazon Ads
Medium Rectangle (IAB 300x250 standard, max 2 per page)
Streamables (30s opt-in ad on Twitch Partnered mobile games)
compliance_notes: SSL/HTTPS required for ALL creative and tracking calls
Amazon Ads approved 3P vendors only — no unapproved ad tech
Geo/browser targeting must be set on the Twitch side, not in 3P tags
refresh_instructions: Refresh quarterly — Amazon Ads updates Twitch specs periodically
Check format AU locale availability when adding Twitch line items to AU plans (Mid-Feed Ads not currently in AU)
